understanding.profile: PT Sinar Manufaktur Nusantara requires an integrated ERP system to streamline production, procurement, inventory, and finance, improving control and visibility across its plants.
understanding.current_system: Currently running on spreadsheets and a standalone accounting package, with no integration between production and finance.

items: Work orders and shop-floor progress tracked manually.
No real-time bill-of-materials or material availability check.
Production scheduling maintained in Excel, prone to conflicts.
Purchase orders created and approved manually.
No vendor price comparison; quotes compared in spreadsheets.
Monthly close is manual and slow.
No real-time inventory valuation across plants.
Limited cost visibility per work order.

process.loop_note: Closed loop: production consumption and finished-goods output update inventory and cost in real time.
process.reporting_note: Reporting & Dashboards across all stages — production output · procurement performance · inventory valuation · cost per work order · financial close

benefits: Increased throughput through production & procurement automation
Real-time inventory and BOM accuracy across plants
Faster PO and work-order approval cycles

scope.scope_function: Item master, bill of materials, counterparties.
PR, RFQ, PO, multi-level approval, vendor price comparison.
Work orders from BOM, material issue, production reporting, work-order costing.
Raw / WIP / finished stock, transfers, adjustments, real-time valuation.
Production output, procurement, inventory valuation, cost per work order.

commercials.terms: 50% on signing, 40% on UAT, 10% on go-live

assumptions: Pricing assumes one production environment plus one test environment, hosted by the client.
Master data (items, BOMs, vendors, customers) is provided by the client in agreed templates before migration.
Up to 2 plants are in scope; additional sites are a change request.
Custom enhancements are limited to BOM and work-order costing as scoped; further customization is quoted separately.
The client provides timely access to subject-matter experts and UAT sign-off within agreed windows.
Training covers up to 5 core users per plant, train-the-trainer thereafter.
Licenses are billed to the client; all prices exclude VAT.
